name: Ford, Curtis
resolved_employer: Media Choice, LLC (founder/CEO, outdoor advertising/billboards); also Travis County representative on LCRA Board of Directors
evidence: Curtis E. Ford, founder/CEO of MediaChoice, an outdoor-advertising (billboard/digital signage) firm at 3701 Bee Caves Rd, Austin 78746 - matches donor zip. Licensed CPA; Gov. Abbott-appointed LCRA board member representing Travis County. Gave to Jeff Travillion.

name: Braun, Peggy Davis
evidence: Could not confirm. A 'Peggy Braun' (age ~76) is listed in Austin public-records aggregators, and a Peggy Braun at 3939 Bee Caves Rd, West Lake Hills 78746 appears in people-search data (zip matches), but no occupation or public profile could be corroborated. One-time 2022 gift to Ann Howard; no FEC history.

name: Richmond, Karin
evidence: Karin Richmond is principal of Intelligent.Incentives, Inc., an Austin consultancy at 1343 Spyglass Dr, 78746 (matches donor zip) specializing in tax-incentive policy and large-scale incentive negotiation. Former National Director of Incentives at a state-and-local-tax firm; chaired Texas Enterprise Zone Board; IEDC Fellow and former board member. Gave to Brigid Shea.

name: Sesil, Joseph (Mr.)
evidence: A 'Joe Sesil' has a LinkedIn profile based in Austin, and his name recurs alongside equity/executive-compensation consulting keywords (a related academic, James C. Sesil, publishes on employee stock options), suggesting he works in compensation consulting - but his specific current employer could not be confirmed, and downtown zip 78701 was not independently corroborated. Gave to Brigid Shea.

name: Mason, Norman
evidence: A prominent candidate is Dr. Norman L. Mason, DDS, a longtime East Austin dentist and Black community leader (donation to Precinct 1 commissioner Jeff Travillion would fit thematically), but his practice zips are 78702/78752, NOT the donor's NW-Austin zip 78717 - the zip mismatch and the commonness of the name prevent confirmation. Could be a same-named person.

name: Harper, Alan
evidence: Unidentifiable: no zip/location in the record, a very common name, and 2,084 prior FEC gifts (a prolific small-dollar recurring donor) with no distinguishing details. Cannot be tied to a specific individual. One 2021 gift to Jeff Travillion.

name: Musil, Robert
resolved_employer: Rachel Carson Council (President & CEO); former Executive Director/CEO of Physicians for Social Responsibility (1992-2006)
evidence: Robert K. Musil, PhD MPH, President/CEO of the Rachel Carson Council, headquartered at 8600 Irvington Ave, Bethesda MD 20817 - matches donor city/zip exactly. Longtime environmental advocate and former ED of Physicians for Social Responsibility (1985 Nobel Peace laureate org); adjunct professor at American University. Gave to environmentalist Brigid Shea.

name: Maldonado, Hilbert
resolved_employer: Hill-Bert's Burgers (founder, est. 1973; now run by his children - semi-retired); former 10-year chairman of a Community Development Corporation allocating CDBG funds
evidence: Hilbert Maldonado (b. 1945), 3304 Vintage Dr, Round Rock 78664-7900 - exact match to donor address. UT-Austin alum who founded the Hill-Bert's Burgers restaurant with his wife in 1973 (a 50+ year Central Austin institution, now operated by his son and daughter). Also served 10 years as chairman of a Community Development Corporation directing ~$12M/yr of federal CDBG funds toward affordable housing/economic development for Hispanic communities. Gave to Brigid Shea.

name: Robinson, Richard
evidence: A Richard Emzy Robinson (age ~50) is placed in Del Valle 78617 (zip matches) by people-search aggregators, listed as a 'Sales Executive at Reicon Group LLC' - but Reicon Group is a Staten Island, NY marine/heavy-construction contractor, the connection is unverified, and 'Richard Robinson' is a very common name. Not confidently identified. Gave to Jeff Travillion.

name: Baker, Luther
evidence: Could not identify. 'Luther Baker' at Pflugerville 78660 returns no usable public profile (searches dominated by an unrelated Civil War figure and generic people-search listings). No occupation or corroborating detail found. Gave to Jeff Travillion.

name: Walker, Lorenzo
resolved_employer: Legum & Norman (Associa) - General Manager / Community (HOA & condominium) Manager
evidence: Lorenzo Walker, Springfield VA, is a General Manager at Legum & Norman (an Associa company), a large HOA/condominium property-management firm in the DC metro (Falls Church VA HQ) - matches the occupation ('Community Manager-GM') and employer strings already in the record. Gave to George Morales.

name: Capra & Cavelli

evidence: Capra & Cavelli is a high-end men's clothing and custom-suit store at 3500 Jefferson St, Austin 78731 (matches donor zip), operating since 1995. This is a business-entity contribution rather than an individual. Gave to Brigid Shea.
